enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Operative
Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Operative Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall apply to every Non-Operative Financial Holding Company
(NOFHC) as defined in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: Financial Holding Company (NOFHC) as defined in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Consolidated capital funds' means the Capital, Reserves and Surplus of the
NOFHC determined on the consolidation of its subsidiaries, associates and joint
ventures in accordance with the applicable Accounting Standards.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Consolidated capital funds' means the Capital, Reserves and Surplus of the NOFHC determined on the cons

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Non-Operative Financial Holding Company (NOFHC)' means a non-deposit
taking NBFC, which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of
all other financial services companies in its group, whether regulated by the
Reserve Bank or by any other financial regulator, to the extent permissible
under the applicable regulatory prescriptions.
enriched_requirements.object: which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of all other financial services companies in its group, whether

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Promoter' means the person who together with his relatives [as defined in
Section 2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by
virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of
the bank / NOFHC, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form
enriched_requirements.object: with his relatives [as defined in Section 2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / NOFHC, and includes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the
form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of
control.
enriched_requirements.object: the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC shall be registered with RBI as a non-banking financial company
(NBFC).
enriched_requirements.object: as a non-banking financial company (NBFC)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A company seeking registration as an NOFHC shall first have received an in-
principle approval for setting up a bank from the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: in- principle approval for setting up a bank from the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The application for
registration of NOFHC shall be made with the requisite information and documents
through PRAVAAH portal to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: requisite information and documents through PRAVAAH portal to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Not less than 51 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the NOFHC shall be
owned by the Promoter / Promoter Group.
enriched_requirements.object: Promoter / Promoter Group

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC shall hold the bank as well as all the other financial services entities of
the Group regulated by RBI or other financial sector regulators.
enriched_requirements.object: well as all the other financial services entities of the Group regulated by RBI or other financial sector regulators

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The objective is that
the Holding Company should ring fence the regulated financial services entities of the
Group, including the bank, from other activities of the Group i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: financial services entities of the Group, including the bank, from other activities of the Group i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
commercial, and
financial activities not regulated by financial sector regulators and also that the bank
should be ring fenced from other regulated financial activities of the Group.
enriched_requirements.object: other regulated financial activities of the Group

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The capital structure of the NOFHC set up by Promoter / Promoter Group shall be
as under:
(1) The shareholding of the Promoter / Promoter Group in the NOFHC shall be only
through individuals, non-financial services entities and Core Investment
Companies in the Group.
enriched_requirements.object: The shareholding of the Promoter / Promoter Group in the NOFHC shall be only through individuals, non-financial services entities and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Consequently, no financial services entity in the
promoter group, other than those specified above, shall be eligible to be a
shareholder in the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: a shareholder in the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Not less than 51 per cent of the total voting equity shares of the NOFHC shall be
held by promoter/s / companies forming part of the Promoter Group.
enriched_requirements.object: / companies forming part of the Promoter Group

conditions:
In case the
shareholding is by companies of the promoter group
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the
shareholding is by companies of the promoter group, such companies shall
preferably have a diversified shareholding.
enriched_requirements.object: shareholding

conditions:
In case 51 per cent or more of promoter group shareholding in the NOFHC is held
by individuals belonging to the Promoter Group
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3)In case 51 per cent or more of promoter group shareholding in the NOFHC is held
by individuals belonging to the Promoter Group, shareholding by each of such
individual, along with his relatives [as defined in Section 2 (77) of the Companies
Act, 2013 and Rules made there under] and along with entities in which he and /
or his relatives hold 50 per cent or more of the voting equity shares, shall not
exceed 15 per cent of the total paid-up equity capital of the NOFHC per such
individual.
enriched_requirements.object: of the total paid-up equity capital of the NOFHC per such individual

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, shareholding by a single
individual, who is not a promoter, along with his relatives [as defined in Section 2
(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under] and along with
entities in which he and / or his relatives hold 50 per cent or more of the voting
equity shares, shall not be more than 10 per cent of the total shareholding of the
NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the total shareholding of the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) No shareholder, other than the promoters / promoter group, shall have significant
influence and control in the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: control in the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in shareholding within the NOFHC, as a result of which a shareholder
transfers / acquires five per cent or more of its total equity capital, from the date of
grant of in-principle approval, shall be reported to RBI.

The Promoters / Promoter Group entities / individuals associated with Promoter
Group shall hold equity investment in the bank and other regulated financial entities in
the group only through the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank and other regulated financial entities in the group only through the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-voting capital shall not be reckoned for the purpose of calculation of promoter
shareholding in the NOFHC/ bank.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of calculation of promoter shareholding in the NOFHC/ bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC should comply with the corporate governance guidelines as issued
by RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: governance guidelines as issued by RBI from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such guidelines shall include the following:
(1) No NOFHC shall have as a Director in its Board of Directors, any person who
is a Director in any other NOFHC or a bank other than a banking company
under it.
enriched_requirements.object: No NOFHC shall have as a Director in its Board of Directors, any person who is a Director in any other NOFHC or a bank othe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No NOFHC shall be managed by any person-
Explanation: Major customers and major suppliers of the promoter group would
mean dealings with whom constitute 10 per cent or more of the annual
purchases or sales or both taken together.
enriched_requirements.object: person- Explanation: Major customers and major suppliers of the promoter group would mean dealings with whom constitute 10 per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a director of the NOFHC being also a director on the Board of the
bank held by it cannot be considered as independent director of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: NOFHC being also a director on the Board of the bank held by it cannot be considered as independent director of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The Independent Directors referred to above shall have special knowledge or
practical experience in respect of one or more of the following matters, namely,
enriched_requirements.object: practical experience in respect of one or more of the following matters, namely,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) NOFHC shall comply with such soundness standards in terms of corporate
governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, as applicable to banks, as
contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Governance)
Directions, 2025, to the extent appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: standards in terms of corporate governance including 'fit and proper' criteria, as applicable to banks, as contained in Res

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) At least 50 per cent of the Directors of NOFHC shall be totally independent of
the Promoter or Promoter Group entities and their major customers and major
suppliers.
enriched_requirements.object: the Promoter or Promoter Group entities and their major customers and major suppliers

conditions: Provided that Debt mutual funds are not covered under money market instruments
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that Debt mutual funds are not covered under money market instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: not covered under money market instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC shall create a reserve fund and shall, out of the balance of profit each
year as disclosed in the profit and loss account and before any dividend is declared,
transfer to the reserve fund a sum equivalent to not less than 25 per cent of such profit.
enriched_requirements.object: and shall, out of the balance of profit each year as disclosed in the profit and loss account and before any dividend is declare

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any dividend proposed to be paid by the NOFHC to its shareholders shall be
payable only out of the profits and further subject to meeting the following conditions:
(1) Compliance with all prudential norms prescribed for the NOFHC both on stand-
alone as well as consolidated level.
enriched_requirements.object: of the profits and further subject to meeting the following conditions: (1) Compliance with all prudential norms prescribed for th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The financial statements of the NOFHC both on stand-alone and consolidated
level shall be free of any qualifications by the statutory auditors, which have an
adverse bearing on the profit during that year.
enriched_requirements.object: qualifications by the statutory auditors, which have an adverse bearing on the profit during that year

conditions:
In case of any qualification to that
effect
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any qualification to that
effect, the net profit should be suitably adjusted while computing the dividend
payout ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: computing the dividend payout ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The NOFHC shall closely monitor its liquidity position and interest rate risk.
enriched_requirements.object: position and interest rate risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For
this purpose, the NOFHC shall prepare a structural liquidity statement (SLS) and
interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: statement (SLS) and interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC may have a leverage up to 1.25 times of its paid-up equity capital and
free reserves.
enriched_requirements.object: to 1

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The actual leverage assumed within this limit should be based on the
ability of the NOFHC to service its borrowings from its dividend income.
enriched_requirements.object: ability of the NOFHC to service its borrowings from its dividend income

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NOFHC shall maintain capital adequacy and other requirements on a consolidated
basis based on the prudential guidelines specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: other requirements on a consolidated basis based on the prudential guidelines specified under Reserve Bank of India (Com

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC shall prepare consolidated financial statements in terms of the
instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in terms of the instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial Statements: Pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NOFHC shall also
compute consolidated capital adequacy ratio as indicated under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: adequacy ratio as indicated under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Di

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The consolidated NOFHC shall adhere to the instructions on disclosure in Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and
Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: on disclosure in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The consolidated NOFHC shall prepare a structural liquidity statement (SLS),
interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: statement (SLS), interest rate sensitivity statement (IRS) as specified under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NOFHC shall not have any credit and investment (including investment in equity /
debt capital instrument) exposure to any entity belonging to the Promoter Group
except those held under it.
enriched_requirements.object: investment (including investment in equity / debt capital instrument) exposure to any entity belonging to the Promoter Group excep

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NOFHC shall not have any equity, debt capital and credit exposure to any entity
outside the Group including other NOFHCs or other banks, financial and non-financial
entities.
enriched_requirements.object: capital and credit exposure to any entity outside the Group including other NOFHCs or other banks, financial and non-financial e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The consolidated NOFHC shall adhere to all the exposure norms (as per Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks -Concentration Risk Management) Directions,
2025), on the consolidated basis such as large exposure framework, capital market
exposure limit etc, as applicable to groups.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure norms (as per Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025), on the consolidate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The consolidated NOFHC's investments in the capital instruments issued by
banking, financial and insurance entities outside its Group together with the
unconsolidated financial and insurance entities within the Group should not exceed 10
per cent of its consolidated capital funds.
enriched_requirements.object: of its consolidated capital funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Unconsolidated means entities which are outside of the scope of
regulatory consolidation.
enriched_requirements.object: of the scope of regulatory consolidation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Consolidated capital funds for regulatory purpose means the consolidated regulatory
capital of the NOFHC under the regulatory scope of consolidation as per Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025 and Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: of the NOFHC under the regulatory scope of consolidation as per Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudenti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall not invest in the equity / debt capital instruments of any financial
entities under the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: / debt capital instruments of any financial entities under the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank's investments in equity / debt capital instruments of other banks /
financial institutions including other NOFHCs shall be guided by the extant cross
holding norms as per Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: extant cross holding norms as per Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in equity by the bank in the entities engaged in financial and non-
financial activities, outside the Promoter Group would be subject to a limit of 10 per
cent of the investee entity's paid-up share capital or 10 per cent of the bank's paid-up
share capital and reserves, whichever is less, and the aggregate of all such
investments should not exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and
reserves.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The financial entities held by the NOFHC shall adhere to the following overarching
principles in order to avoid round tripping of funds and to avoid circular movement of
funds in the banking group, such as:
(1) The financial entities held by NOFHC shall not have any credit and investments
(including investments in the equity/debt capital instruments) exposure to the
Promoters / Promoter Group entities or individuals associated with the Promoter
Group or the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: investments (including investments in the equity/debt capital instruments) exposure to the Promoters / Promoter Group entities or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The financial entities held by NOFHC shall not make investment in the equity /
debt capital instruments amongst themselves.
enriched_requirements.object: equity / debt capital instruments amongst themselves

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Apart from setting up the bank, the NOFHC shall not be permitted to set up any
new financial services entity for at least three years from the date of commencement
of business of the NOFHC.
enriched_requirements.object: up any new financial services entity for at least three years from the date of commencement of business of the NOFHC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1The general principle for reorganization of the activities in the group is that all
activities permitted to a bank under Section 6 (1) (a) to (o) of Banking Regulation Act,
1949 shall be carried out from the bank
enriched_requirements.object: the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
2However, specialized activities such as Mutual fund business, insurance
business, pension fund management, investment advisory and management services,
portfolio management services and broking services shall be carried out only through
Subsidiary/Joint venture/Associate structure;
enriched_requirements.object: through Subsidiary/Joint venture/Associate structure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3An NOFHC shall not require prior approval of the Reserve Bank for the entities
held by it to undertake activities mentioned under paragraph 45 above, unless advised
otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank for the entities held by it to undertake activities mentioned under paragraph 45 above

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15 days from
the date of resolution of the Board for undertaking such businesses
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the NOFHC shall intimate the Reserve Bank within 15 days from
the date of resolution of the Board for undertaking such businesses.
enriched_requirements.object: within 15 days from the date of resolution of the Board for undertaking such businesses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4Notwithstanding the conditions above, an NOFHC shall require the prior approval
of the Reserve Bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business
subject to other instructions as applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business subject to other instructions as ap

conditions:
If the non-operative holding
company is a CIC or other NBFC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the non-operative holding
company is a CIC or other NBFC, the relevant directions shall be applicable.

RBI will have to be satisfied that the corporate structure does not impede the
financial services entities held by the NOFHC from being ring fenced, that it would be
able to supervise the bank, the NOFHC, and its Subsidiaries / Joint Ventures /
Associates on a consolidated basis, and that, it will be able to obtain all required
information relevant for this purpose, smoothly and promptly.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose, smoothly and promptly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
enriched_requirements.object: affect:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any
such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or
enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
